articles.title: Ethereum Foundation’s Aya Miyaguchi ‘stepping up’ as president as Vitalik Buterin promises leadership changes
articles.description: Miyaguchi has drawn ire in part due a perceived lack of competitiveness and failure to steward Ethereum's scaling solutions.

articles.title: Aya Miyagotchi to become president of Ethereum Foundation
articles.description: Aya Miyaguchi announced today she will transition from Executive Director to President of the Ethereum Foundation (EF), a decision she made a year ago.In her new role, Miyaguchi will focus on supporting EF's institutional relationships and expanding the organization's vision and culture more broadly."Ethereum belongs to everyone precisely because it belongs to no one," Miyaguchi wrote in her...

articles.title: Grayscale files for Polkadot ETF
articles.description: Grayscale has filed a Polkadot ETF application with the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC). It’s the latest spot ETF application, with this one on Polkadot joining the filing by 21Shares earlier this month. Grayscale Investments has filed for a Polkadot (DOT) exchange-traded fund, the latest in a series of crypto ETF applications issuers have submitted […] The post Grayscale files for Polkadot ETF appeared first on CoinJournal.

articles.title: Cathie Wood Says Bitcoin Consolidation Extremely Healthy Amid ‘Early Stages’ of Institutional Adoption: Report
articles.description: ARK Invest’s Cathie Wood reportedly says that Bitcoin’s (BTC) market structure remains strong and the flagship crypto asset may soon have a massive breakout. According to a new Barron’s report, Wood says at the Cboe Global Markets 2025 Bitcoin Outlook webinar that the sideways trading of the top digital asset in the $90,000 range this […] The post Cathie Wood Says Bitcoin Consolidation...

articles.title: SEC Acknowledges Cardano ETF Application from Grayscale
articles.description: The SEC has accepted a proposal by NYSE Arca to list and trade a spot Cardano ETF.

articles.title: Strategy Makes Largest Bitcoin Purchase of 2025 with $2B Investment
articles.description: Strategy (formerly MicroStrategy) makes its largest Bitcoin purchase of 2025, acquiring over 20,000 BTC for nearly $2 billion amid stock declines.

articles.title: GOP Divisions Threaten State-Level Bitcoin Reserve Bills
articles.description: Bitcoin Reserve bills face setbacks as Republican divisions grow, with GOP-led states rejecting proposals despite strong industry and political support.
